seo_title: OpenAI Shuffles Executives to Focus on AI Agent Battle
meta_description: OpenAI is reorganizing its executives to focus on developing AI agents, with company president Greg Brockman leading the charge.
body_html:
OpenAI is shuffling its executives to focus on developing AI agents, with company president Greg Brockman leading the charge.

Combining Products for a Unified Agentic ExperienceChatGPT and Codex will be merged into one unified agentic experience for all.The company is investing in a single agentic platform to bring agents to ChatGPT scale.This move aims to give individuals and organizations significantly more value and utility from OpenAI's products.Leadership PillarsPillarLeaderCore Product and PlatformThibault SottiauxCritical Enterprise IndustriesNick TurleyConsumer PillarAshley AlexanderCore Infrastructure, Ads, Data Science, and GrowthVijaye RajiReorganization GoalsOpenAI's goal is now to bring agents to ChatGPT scale, in order to give individuals and organizations significantly more value and utility from our products.

source.title: OpenAI keeps shuffling its executives in bid to win AI agent battle
source.summary: OpenAI announced yet another reorganization Friday, consolidating certain areas and making company president Greg Brockman the official lead of all things product. In a memo viewed by The Verge, Brockman wrote that since OpenAI's product strategy for this year is to go all-in on AI agents, the company is combining its products to "invest in […]
